name: corydalis yanhusuo
title: best benefits of corydalis yanhusuo
description: Corydalis yanhusuo relieves anxiety, which is a state of intense fear or worry that interferes with daily activities and overall well-being. This benefit is important because anxiety can lead to problems such as insomnia, digestive issues, and difficulty concentrating, affecting one's quality of life and relationships.
